programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Voiles de Legende 2013
programme.desc: Welcome to La Baule, in Brittany, for the 11th edition of the Voiles de Legende. We have wonderful weather conditions this year and the line-up is filled with many classic boats, like the Pen Duick, some Fife boats and also the Metre-class boats with a very special guest: France, the first French challenger for the America's Cup launched by Baron Bich in 1970. Come see this gathering of big boats in La Baule's port as we prepare to set sail with these legendary boats.

programme.title: Rios Patagonicos
programme.desc: 15 canyoneers go on a life-changing expedition to discover the immensity of Chilean Patagonia in search for untouched territories, rivers and waterfalls organised by the Regard sur l’Aventure association. Their goal: to explore this mysterious land and spot and open over 30 canyons on a land where canyoneering is close to non-existent.For some, Rios Patagonicos is the opportunity to go on an expedition for the first time. For more skilled canyoneers, it is the occasion to share their experience on a tricky terrain. However, all of them will have to cooperate and share a common desire: the thrill of unveiling the unknown in a trip that awakes fear and team spirit.Awards:Finalist – Everest International Film Festival 2020. Finalist – The Taste Awards 2020. Finalist Best Sport Film – Flicks Film Festival 2019. Best Short Documentary – Panama International Film Festival 2019, Maracay International Film Festival 2019, Short Film Factory 2019. Semi-Finalist – New Harvest Film Festival 2019. Official Selections 2020: ATFF Costwolds, Trieste Int Mountain Film Festival, Naturetrack Film Festival, Mammoth Film Festival, Backpacklight Adventure Film Festival, Frozen River Film Festival, PIMFF etc. Official Selections 2019: Bansko, Explorimage, Festival du Film de Montagne, FICTS, Winter Film Festival, Rome Independent Prisma Awards, Sestriere Film Festival, Ember Aquatics Int Film Festival, Explos, Int Nature Film Festival Godollo, Les Escales Voyageuses, Rencontres du Film de Montagne, Adventure Shorts Film Festival, Big Water Film Festival, Action! Int Film Festival, Mountain & Adventure Film Festival, Vertical Life Film Festival, Veracruz Short Film Festival, Montevideo Int Film Festival, Inca Int Film Festival, BangkokThai Int Film Festival etc.

programme.title: South to Sian
programme.desc: In a time where there are fences around everything, and we are denied the instinct of self-preservation, it is difficult to find a place free from rules and restrictions, but not yet impossible.Surf movies come and go, a million waves in exotic locations and surfers flown in for three-day shoots on perfect swells, but the spirit of adventure never dies.What began as a three-month trip to a collection of surf breaks off the beaten track turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration, injury, companionship and 4,000km of two-wheeled, single-finned escape from the the real-world burdens of modern life.Harrison Roach and Zye Norris pack their bags, a diverse quiver of boards, two bikes and a 50-dollar tent into a 1970s Land Rover and embark on an epic quest from the southern reaches of Bali, through the Indonesian archipelago to Northern Sumatra’s isolated Lagundri Bay. On boards, on bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, the pair’s journey is to discover if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.

programme.title: Wild Surf - Episode 10
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Perilous Sea
programme.desc: Perilous Sea is a transcontinental cold-water surfing odyssey capturing the raw spirit, glorious landscapes and pure perfection that arises when conditions align. This incredible story creates moments of cold-water nirvana that rival any across the globe.Inspired by the storytelling style of classic ocean-fairing novels, Perilous Sea follows a group of surfers as they explore the landscapes and waves of the North Atlantic fringes. From the Canadian Maritimes, north to Iceland and beyond to the wave rich coast of Ireland, this award-winning film takes us on a journey to the world of surf.Follow them into the water as they dare to get into the treacherous waters that have taken the lives of many in Perilous Sea: a story of overcoming challenges and spirituality.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 17
programme.desc: Sun Odyssey 440 is one of the latest creations of Jeanneau, and we cannot wait to get on board and try it out. After testing it we move on to try the Corsair 760, a trailerable trimaran, before travelling to Lake Maggiore, in Northern Italy. Here, the Ranieri 240SH is waiting for us.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 18
programme.desc: Coming from Cape Town, South Africa, the Xquisite 50 has been designed to travel anywhere in the world with no limits, we are about to test that in the water in The Boat Show. Then, we move to Sardinia to experience the exciting Selva D540 EVO. Finally, we've come to hunt for a different kind of sail boat, different from the usual ones seen in the Mediterranean Sea: the Marlow Hunter 47.

programme.title: Perilous Sea

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 5
programme.desc: This time we stay in Europe but find ourselves in Russia's most western and exquisite city: St. Petersburg. We are following the 2019 RS:X Youth World Championship, and this event was hosted by the St. Petersburg Regional Sports, non-governmental Organization: Yacht Club of St. Petersburg. We stay for the opening ceremony before flying to China for the Nimble Cup Asian Windsurfing Championship 2019. To round off the trip in Olympic classes, join us as we fet off to Italy's San Remo for the 470 European Championships.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 6
programme.desc: Welcome to another episode of Sailing to Tokyo! This time we visit the famous Torbole where the whole of the Worldwide Olympic Windsurfing community focusses for the 2019 RS:X Windsurfing World Championships. Then, we will move to Asia and the largest in the United Arab Emirates, Abu Dhabi. There, the Abu Dhabi Sailing and Yacht club hosted the inaugural 49er and 49er FX Asian Championships. To round off the trip, we stay in Asia but jet off to Japaon for one of the most significant events in the 470 class: the 2019 470 World Championship.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 3
programme.desc: Coming up in this week's episode, the crews are ready for an all Australian adventure as they sail coast to coast. On reaching Sydney, they will join the blue riband Sydney Hobart Yacht Race with hundreds of other sailors.. After seeing the New Year in Tasmania, this is the final race of this leg, and they will be racing to the breath-taking Whitsunday islands.

After seeing the New Year in Tasmania, this is the final race of this leg, and they will be racing to the breath-taking Whitsunday islands.

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Semi-Final
programme.desc: As INEOS Team UK won the Round Robins, now it is the time for Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli and NYYC American Magic to compete on this semi-final of the 2021 Prada Cup. The first to win four races will become the final contender against the British team in this competition. Who will that be?

programme.title: Jet RAID - Greece
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2019 edition of Jet Raid, the first step of a World Championship that is considered like the Dakar of the Sea. Specially prepared for these endurance races, the machines are divided in F1, F2, F3 and F4. The defending champion, Jean-Bruno Pastorello came in strong with his team. With the impressive lineup of the competition, will he be able to repeat last year's victory?

programme.title: Perilous Sea
programme.desc: Perilous Sea is a transcontinental cold-water surfing odyssey capturing the raw spirit, glorious landscapes and pure perfection that arises when conditions align. This incredible story creates moments of cold-water nirvana that rival any across the globe.Inspired by the storytelling style of classic ocean-fairing novels, Perilous Sea follows a group of surfers as they explore the landscapes and waves of the North Atlantic fringes. From the Canadian Maritimes, north to Iceland and beyond to the wave rich coast of Ireland, this award-winning film takes us on a journey to the world of surf.Follow them into the water as they dare to get into the treacherous waters that have taken the lives of many in Perilous Sea: a story of overcoming challenges and spirituality.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 7
programme.desc: Poland is a place of immense historical significant that goes back more than a thousand years. Although it is well known for its role in the Second World War, Poland is also being appreciated for its world class cuisine, breathtaking countryside and ease of travel. This week on Facing Waves, we are set to discover the beautiful waterways of Poland.

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this new episode of Sail-Ho Croatia, we explore the Markaska Riviera. This area is best known for its beautiful natural beaches and amazing gastronomic delights. Makarska is the center of the Markaska riviera, and it is a hub of culture, education and tourism. Let's discover it!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4
programme.desc: Welcome to Sail-Ho Croatia! The city of Split was formed around the Roman Emperor Diocletian's Palace, and this was built as his retirement residence. However, we have certainly found it as one of the most exciting, fun and action-packed places in the Adriatic. Let's catch up on Split's action!

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 1
programme.desc: On this first episode of Inside Superyachts we meet with the Godfather of Superyacht builders – Feadship Yachts. Established in 1849, this Dutch shipyard is not only the number one in the industry but also the most famous of all superyacht builders, having created masterpieces for the likes of Steve Jobs.From the Netherlands we take a trip down to the ultra-discreet Principality of Monaco, host of the greatest yacht show in the world ‘The Monaco Yacht Show’. Then, we travel thousands of feet below the sea, exploring the vast ocean with Triton Submarines, utilized by some of films greatest names such as film director James Cameron and presenter David Attenborough.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 2
programme.desc: From the Godfather of builders to the Grandaddy of designers we visit the studio of Bannenberg & Rowell to unveil the legend that is the late great Jon Bannenberg. Following the winds of change we discuss the growing demand for explorer yachts. We meet London based H2 Design, and learn about the groundbreaking 107m explorer M/Y Ulysses.We continue our theme with EYOS Explorer and DAMEN yachts, the largest and most prolific ship builder on the planet.

programme.title: Go Big Or Go Home - Freestyle Kayak
programme.desc: 26-year old freestyle Kayak World Champion Nick Troutman from Canada is on the hunt for the best whitewater in the world. He set his search with his three best buddies: 28-year old Mathieu Dumoulin from France – two times European Champion, 27-year old Gerd Serrasolses from Spain and 29-year old Slovakian Peter Csonka – twice European champion and three times runner up in the World Championships.All four athletes are members of the Adidas Sickline Kayak Team, and in winter, they flee the cold and travel to the White Nile in Uganda. However, the highlight of this trip comes when in summer they return to the huge river waves in Quebec. This team of adventurers continue to push themselves and their sport to the limit, their motto: “Go Big or Go Home!”

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 11
programme.desc: In this month’s episode we will start our journey at Lake Traunsee in Austria following the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Team Relay European Championships. Next, we travel to Greece in order to follow an inaugural regatta for traditional boats, Oceanida, organized by Attica Region and Nautical Club 78.After that, we are going to have a closer look to one of the oldest Olympic boats, the 470 class and focus on the Dutch 470 sailor Afrodite Zegers.

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 12
programme.desc: This is the last episode for 2020, so we have recollected the best action in Austria. At Lake Attersee the 2020 Forward WIP 49er, 49erFX & Nacra 17 European Championships are taking place, and the fastest Olympic classes have been tested to their limites in this event.Next, we move to Portoroz in Slovenia for the 2020 Optimist European Championships. More than two hundred sailors across five different categories have gathered to compete, and we are ready for top-leveled sailing. Finally, we head to China and the Shanghai Yacht Club for a world class youth sailing competition.

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 5
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 6
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 5
programme.desc: Today we are going to visit the Hippie Market at Formentera, famous all over the world for its unique type of creativity. We will be making new friends that will be teaching us about their favourite music styles and, this close to the end, will our two protagonists be getting sentimental? Not without a mojito at the beach first! Let's dive in!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 6
programme.desc: Our adventure is coming to an end, but the party never stops! Sam and Max have lived their adventure in Ibiza and Formentera, and have to get back home to show family and friends their new skills. We are sailing one last time and partying until dawn to make the most out of our time in Ibiza.

programme.title: Transat Panerai Classique
programme.desc: World Champion Kitesurfer and Nautical Channel host, Bruno Sroka travels to Martinique to welcome the gems of the sea from their Atlantic crossing. The Transat Panerai Classique 2015 is arriving to the Caribbean island. They departed from Lanzarote, in the Canary Islands, and after sailing 3.000nm these classic and historic sailing ships have endured the hardships of the ocean and are eager to arrive in first place for a well deserved victory. Witness some of the most extraordinary yachts ever built and have fun seeing Bruno take the sea on both a traditional Martinique Yoles boat and a Classic European one. Classic Boats, Turquoise Caribbean waters and world champion hosts... what more could we ask for? Enjoy the Transat Panerai Classique 2015 on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Join us on a journey through one of the most welcoming island of the Caribbean, Guadeloupe! Explore its natural habitats rich in colour and rhythmic sounds that hypnotize us in this dreamy destination.Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe takes us on a journey in the world of art as we meet a local artist whose art shines light on our modern habits. Discover this hub for scuba divers as you swim through Cousteau's underwater reserve, a breath-taking spot for all those who love diving into the clear blue waters of the Caribbean.Finally, come dance to the drumbeats of a Caribbean jam whilst allowing the contagious energy to move you. Not many islands lend themselves as well as Guadeloupe! Be sure not to miss our exciting excavation through this unforgettable island on the Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour Magazines - Episode 9
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this episode Chef Lapo Magni and his Captain sail to Elba Island, he will meet with a top Chef from the restaurant Il Chiasso. It is all about the simplicity of Italian Cuisine and combining one or two local ingredients to create a truly unique flavour. Lapo will be up for the ultimate judgement when he opens a temporary kitchen on board and invites guests to critique his island inspired meal.

programme.title: Chef On Board - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode Lapo arrives in Capraia, a beautiful island in the Tuscan Archipelago. Rich with volcanic soil Capraia produces some excellent wines, and harvests some unique plants that make rich flavours. Lapo will discover the island with a world champion spier fisherman who uses sustainable fishing methods to serve at his five star restaurant. Will he impress the hardest critiques when they sample his dish or will he fail to impress? As usual he is still trying to win over his Captain.

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Semi-Final
programme.desc: As INEOS Team UK won the Round Robins, now it is the time for Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli and NYYC American Magic to compete on this semi-final of the 2021 Prada Cup. The first to win four races will become the final contender against the British team in this competition. Who will that be?

programme.title: Wild Surf - Episode 10
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Perilous Sea
programme.desc: Perilous Sea is a transcontinental cold-water surfing odyssey capturing the raw spirit, glorious landscapes and pure perfection that arises when conditions align. This incredible story creates moments of cold-water nirvana that rival any across the globe.Inspired by the storytelling style of classic ocean-fairing novels, Perilous Sea follows a group of surfers as they explore the landscapes and waves of the North Atlantic fringes. From the Canadian Maritimes, north to Iceland and beyond to the wave rich coast of Ireland, this award-winning film takes us on a journey to the world of surf.Follow them into the water as they dare to get into the treacherous waters that have taken the lives of many in Perilous Sea: a story of overcoming challenges and spirituality.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 3
programme.desc: Coming up in this week's episode, the crews are ready for an all Australian adventure as they sail coast to coast. On reaching Sydney, they will join the blue riband Sydney Hobart Yacht Race with hundreds of other sailors.. After seeing the New Year in Tasmania, this is the final race of this leg, and they will be racing to the breath-taking Whitsunday islands.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 7
programme.desc: Poland is a place of immense historical significant that goes back more than a thousand years. Although it is well known for its role in the Second World War, Poland is also being appreciated for its world class cuisine, breathtaking countryside and ease of travel. This week on Facing Waves, we are set to discover the beautiful waterways of Poland.

programme.title: Bol D'Or: The Swiss Do It Better
programme.desc: The Bol D’Or Mirabaud is the most important inland lake regatta in the world. Taking place in Switzerland, a landlocked nation that sits on top of the sailing world with multiple successes whether in the Olympic, Offshore or in Grand Prix Racing formats, and champion of two America’s Cup victories. The race started in 1939 and it is a symbolic race that brings together the best of Switzerland’s sailing tradition.Every year they welcome mono-hulls and multihulls on Lake Geneva, starting in the city of Geneva. More than 500 boats fight each other on this 123 kilometre (66.5 nautical miles) course from Geneva to Le Bouveret and back. It is a national treasure that every summer gathers thousands of spectators to the shores of Lake Geneva and really shows how the Swiss indeed do it better.Watch the race and become one with the beauty of Switzerland’s background, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 1
programme.desc: On this first episode of Inside Superyachts we meet with the Godfather of Superyacht builders – Feadship Yachts. Established in 1849, this Dutch shipyard is not only the number one in the industry but also the most famous of all superyacht builders, having created masterpieces for the likes of Steve Jobs.From the Netherlands we take a trip down to the ultra-discreet Principality of Monaco, host of the greatest yacht show in the world ‘The Monaco Yacht Show’. Then, we travel thousands of feet below the sea, exploring the vast ocean with Triton Submarines, utilized by some of films greatest names such as film director James Cameron and presenter David Attenborough.

programme.title: Inside Superyachts - Episode 2
programme.desc: From the Godfather of builders to the Grandaddy of designers we visit the studio of Bannenberg & Rowell to unveil the legend that is the late great Jon Bannenberg. Following the winds of change we discuss the growing demand for explorer yachts. We meet London based H2 Design, and learn about the groundbreaking 107m explorer M/Y Ulysses.We continue our theme with EYOS Explorer and DAMEN yachts, the largest and most prolific ship builder on the planet.

programme.desc: Welcome to the 2019 edition of Jet Raid, the first step of a World Championship that is considered like the Dakar of the Sea. With the impressive lineup of the competition, will he be able to repeat last year's victory?

programme.title: PaddleSUP Mission Amazon
programme.desc: Charlie Head will attempt the first ever stand-up paddle boarding of the main water source of the Amazon, the Rio Marañón in Peru. It’s never been attempted before and will be the most arduous and longest SUP journey ever made.Two months of using just his physical and mental strength, Charlie will overcome extreme terrain, trek around impassable river rock falls, survive freezing waters, high altitude, swarms of insects and suspicious local tribes.However, all the hardships will be worth it if he can help shine some light on one of the planet’s most endangered environments and educates us on conservation as over 20 new dams are planned to be constructed on the river's free-flowing stretches. This could have, according to scientists, drastic consequences on the Amazon basin forever.If Charlie does not embark on this adventure now, he may never be able to do so. Find out more with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 19
programme.desc: Today we are in Pietarsaari, 65 degrees north latitude, in Finland. We came all the way to try one of the most beautiful boats in the world: the Swan. Then, we move to Sardinia to test a boat that has much to offer. The Karnic SL602 surprises people worldwide. Come join us!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 20
programme.desc: We are in the final episode of this season of The Boat Show! To say goodbye to this season, we get onboard the Sacs Rebel 47 Open. Then we move to Portofino, famous for its enchanting beauty, notoriety and boats. This one in particular built by Chris Craft is the Capri 21, and we are testing it on the water. Finally, we will be discovering the Saona 47 from Fountaine Pajot, a French Boatyard.

programme.title: VOR Supremacy
programme.desc: The Volvo Ocean Race sails around 10 cities from all over the world, making it the ultimate test for sailors. Often described as the longest and toughest professional sporting event in the world, it is one of the sport’s big three events, alongside the Olympic Games and America’s Cup.The cannon blast in Alicante sends off the fleet, and once again shakes the sailing world. The veterans finally get their memory back while for the rookies it feels like mission impossible. They share the same obsession for the sea, and many of them have fully dedicated themselves for years, even decades trying to win it.The 2017-18 edition of the Volvo Ocean Race sets sail around the globe. The challenge is full on, and now they are all going rogue.

programme.desc: Tom Jeffords tries to make peace between settlers and Apaches in Arizona territory.

programme.title: Miss Conception
programme.desc: Georgina (Heather Graham) is a successful businesswoman living in London. She believes the only thing missing in her life is a baby, but her boyfriend (Tom Ellis) doesn't want kids. To make matters worse, Georgina's doctor (Nicholas Le Prevost) informs her that she has only one egg left, and she'll be ovulating only for the next four days.

programme.title: Addicted to Fresno
programme.desc: Two sisters (Natasha Lyonne, Judy Greer) stage a cover-up when one accidentally kills a guest at the hotel where they work as maids.

programme.title: Broken
programme.desc: Three suburban English families' lives intertwine with tragic consequences.

programme.title: Brooklyn Rules
programme.desc: Brooklyn, 1985. With the mob world as a backdrop, three life-long friends struggle with questions of love, loss and loyalty.

programme.title: Resistance
programme.desc: After the Nazis successfully invade Britain, a German platoon reaches the Welsh valleys, only to find that all the men of the region have headed for the hills to muster a resistance movement.

programme.title: What Lies Ahead

programme.title: Slipstream
programme.desc: In a futuristic world savaged by the slipstream wind, bounty hunter Matt snatches a murderer with a price of his head from lawman Will Tasker.

programme.title: A Boy And His Dog
programme.desc: Vic (Don Johnson) is a libidinous 18-year-old traversing the post-apocalyptic desert of 2024, in the company of his telepathic dog, Blood. When the pair encounter an underground community, the leader's daughter, Quilla Holmes (Susanne Benton), seduces Vic into their fold, separating him from Blood, who's left to survive on his own. But once Vic discovers he's been lured there solely for mechanized procreation, he realizes he's doomed unless he can escape and rejoin Blood.

programme.title: Alice Sweet Alice
programme.desc: Favorite daughter Karen (Brooke Shields) is viciously strangled and set afire in church on the day of her First Communion, and suspicion falls on her jealous and emotionally unstable sister, Alice (Paula E. Sheppard). When the girls' aunt, Annie (Jane Lowry), is later stabbed on an apartment complex stairway, Alice is sent away. But the attacks continue, prompting priest Father Tom (Rudolph Willrich) and Alice's dad, Dominick (Niles McMaster), to go in search of the real killer.

programme.title: One-Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After pulling a bank heist in Mexico, the outlaw Rio (Marlon Brando) and his partner, Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), make a run for it, but Dad has bigger plans than freedom. He betrays Rio and absconds with the loot, and Rio ends up in prison.

programme.title: Adventures of Power
programme.desc: A mineworker and dreamer - Power - must overcome obstacles and ridicule to become the world's greatest air-drummer.

programme.title: Dial M For Murder
programme.desc: Ex-tennis pro Tony Wendice (Ray Milland) wants to have his wealthy wife, Margot (Grace Kelly), murdered so he can get his hands on her inheritance. When he discovers her affair with Mark Halliday (Robert Cummings), he comes up with the perfect plan to kill her.

programme.title: The Lightkeepers
programme.desc: A grumpy sailor (Richard Dreyfuss) and a young stranger (Tom Wisdom) change their negative opinions about women when two move nearby.

programme.title: Check Point
programme.desc: A vagrant discovers plans for an invasion in America and notifies the local sheriff about the plot. When the sheriff notices odd things happening after dismissing the claims, he begins to investigate the existence of a sleeper cell in the small town.

programme.title: Arcadia
programme.desc: A man (John Hawkes) takes his children on a cross-country move to California and tries to hide the truth about their mother's absence.

programme.title: Numb
programme.desc: A couple in financial distress find GPS coordinates that supposedly lead to a fortune in stolen gold. Desperate for the money, they team up with two hitchhikers to enter a remote winter wilderness to recover the loot.

programme.title: Living and Dying
programme.desc: Two killers hijack a trio of robbers' plans, and hold up a bank themselves. Under lockdown by the police, the robbers must become heroes and save the day before the killers strike.

programme.title: Night Of The Living Dead
programme.desc: The radiation from a fallen satellite causes the recently deceased to rise from the grave and seek the living to use as food.

programme.title: Death Ship
programme.desc: Survivors of a tragic shipping collision are rescued by a mysterious black ship which appears out of the fog. Little do they realise that the ship is a Nazi torture ship which has sailed the seas for years, luring unsuspecting sailors.

programme.title: 2B Perfectly Honest
programme.desc: Two men (Adam Trese, Andrew McCarthy) have different ways of coping with the untimely failure of their Internet business.

programme.title: McLintock
programme.desc: Aging rancher George Washington McLintock (John Wayne), a wealthy self-made man, is forced to deal with numerous personal and professional problems. Seemingly everyone wants a piece of his enormous farmstead, including high-ranking government men, McLintock's own sons and nearby Native Americans.

programme.title: Turning Green
programme.desc: A 16-year-old American, forced to live with his aunts in 1970s Ireland, longs to return to his home country. He makes money by selling pornography from London. Once he has made enough cash to go back, he has to decide where home really is.

programme.title: Not Another Black Movie
programme.desc:
Not Another Black Movie stars Damon Williams (Bad Boys of Comedy, Comic View, BET LIVE, The Tom Joyner Morning Show), Janet Hubert (The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air), Rodney Perry (The Monique Show, Who's Got Jokes) Jay Davis (Not Another Zombie Movie, Shots Fired), and Leon Rogers (WGCI, Comic View, Bad Boys of Comedy).
Not Another Black Movie is not only a spoof of a genre often associated with Tyler Perry films, but a satirical look at family dysfunction as well. Written by Jay Davis and Directed by Donte "Diesel" Williams, Not Another Black Movie addresses issues that effect many families whether they be rich or poor, black or white. Although we poke fun at some of the stereotypical roles portrayed in this genre, we hope to shed some light on problems that plague many families while giving you a good laugh.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business

programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Last Chance Cafe
programme.desc: After uncovering evidence that her stepfather was murdered by a ring of corrupt cops and judges, including her DA ex-husband, a woman is forced to flee with her daughter and hide in a small farming town, where she falls for a local ranch owner but danger soon follows.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Curse of the Dragon
programme.desc: Exotic action/adventure and martial arts blend together as Max Havoc, world famous kickboxer turned sports photographer, faces the relentless Black Dragons in a reluctant quest to save the lovely Goody sisters and to avenge the death of good friend Tahsi in Guam.

programme.title: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Devon thought that his share of difficulties were over after a difficult divorce but on the road to rebuilding his life, tragedy strikes leaving him in a fight for his freedom and his innocence.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Captive Hearts
programme.desc: A finance executive is mysteriously kidnapped and when the hostage takers send video demands directly to the man’s wife, a lone police officer, Detective Kelsoe, has his suspicions.

programme.title: 12 Hours to Live
programme.desc: 18 year old Amy is kidnapped by a deranged gunman wanted for the murder of an FBI Agent and FBI Agent Megan is hot on his trail. When it's learned that Amy is a type-1 diabetic, Megan must once again confront the man who violently killed her partner to save Amy.

programme.title: Universal Soldier III: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: Veronica and Luc conclude their quest to expose the Unisol program to the media and destroy Mentor's (Burt Reynolds) billion dollar heist, while the evil Dr. Walker creates a genetically engineered Unisol GR87, programmed with the single mission to destroy Luc and Veronica.

programme.title: San Saba
programme.desc: Private Investigator Bud wakes from a coma in a hospital room and is immediately charged with murder but did he do it or was he framed? As the story unfolds in flashback, Bud discovers that no one seems to be who he or she claim to be and everyone's motives are suspect.

programme.title: Universal Soldier II: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Luc and Veronica recover and revive Luc's long-lost brother who has been suspended in a cryo-chamber for decades and attempt to expose the Unisol program, led by Mazur (Gary Busey), which recycles dead soldiers in the attempt to create the ultimate mercenary army.

programme.title: Max Havoc: Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Max Havoc is on a new assignment staying at a luxury hotel in the heart of a big city only to discover that the classy hotel owner is a vicious mob boss heading up a crime ring full of unwanted teenagers in the nearby slums.

programme.title: Double Cross
programme.desc: Kathy Swanson and her neighbor, Sheryl, are both having difficulty with their husbands. So when Sheryl suggests to Kathy that they should get their lives back by killing each other’s husbands, Kathy facetiously sanctions the plan.

programme.title: Yoga Is Happiness
programme.desc: You can be happy for no reason at all… Happiness can be our natural state. Start today with attention at the heart center and the recollection of an uplifting memory. Holding on to that feeling, move into practice with a warm up rooted in backbending and sun salutations. Next, follow Kino through through a hip opening sequence. As we approach today’s pinnacle pose, Baddha Konasana, remember that there is no need for the body to be in any particular place. Practice acceptance and happiness here and now.

programme.title: Lolasana
programme.desc: This flow uses a chair supported sun salutation to get you started then flows through standing poses before finishing up with some accessible work in the arm balance Lolasana

programme.title: Ustrasana
programme.desc: A practice that explores the fundamentals of yoga and backbending. The class builds up to Ustrasana, the camel pose.

programme.title: Twist - The Heart - Feel
programme.desc: The final class in this series is all about feeling into and entering the heart space through the vehicle of twists. The unfelt body is a reservoir of the unlived life. Unlock your potential for healing by connecting with these deep inner spaces of the body and just feeling.

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Meditation Now - The Breath
programme.desc: Join Kino for a gentle meditation on the beach by the beautiful shores of Tulum, Mexico. Let go of your thoughts, and experiences as you use the breath to anchor you to the present moment.

programme.title: Meditation Now - The Mind
programme.desc: Find your way to a comfortable seated position and join in with Kino for this beach side meditation. Cultivate a state of stillness, presence, and deep inner awareness. Find ease and rest as you use this time to take a break from the chatter of the mind.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Awaken the Spine – Cobra Pose
programme.desc: This powerful practice with Kino will awaken the spine, helping you feel healthier and happier. Begin with a mindful moment and then flow through a fun sequence of mat based core-strengthening and backbending postures.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Channel Id 2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Is Peace
programme.desc: Om Shanti. Peace is such an integral part of what yoga is that we usually start and end every class with an invocation of it. This class will utilize a seated forward fold to tap into this yogic sense of tranquility. Today's lesson will increase awareness in pelvis and hips so that we can pivot deeper into Paschimottanasana, the forward fold we visit a few times in the Ashtanga method. Join Kino as we explore yoga as a means to further investigate depths of peacefulness that are possible in practice and life.

programme.title: Yoga Is Joy
programme.desc: Open your heart to an experience of pure joy. We’ll use Happy Baby pose to explore what yoga truly is. Flow through child’s pose, puppy pose, squats and hip openers before making your way into the sweet release of Happy Baby. No judgement, no fight, no force… use this practice to touch the unscathed, joyful innocence within you.

programme.title: Yin Yoga for Deep Relaxation and Healing - Yin Yoga to Open Hips and Meditation for Inner Peace
programme.desc: Join this one hour yin yoga for hip opening and meditation for new beginners to get started on your yoga journey.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meet Sahara
programme.desc: Get to know Sahara Rose, author, podcast host, speaker and Ayurvedic student/educator. Find out how she first came to discover Ayurveda and how she learned to incorporate the practices of this ancient system into her everyday life to heal herself from the inside out.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Course Intro
programme.desc: This course is focused on merging Ayurveda with modern nutritional science and a dedicated yoga practice so that you can work toward becoming your highest self. But what exactly is Ayurveda? Tune in to find out and discover what this course is all about.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Discover Your Dosha
programme.desc: Why does Ayurveda matter and how can it help you understand yourself and the world around you? In this episode, Sahara will briefly discuss each of the three doshas and what they have to do with you and the foods you eat? Learn about how your digestion can be affected by the doshas, and how the doshas might be affecting you through this brief intro to Ayurveda with Sahara Rose. Less that 20 minutes.

programme.title: Eat Like a Yogi - Meditation for Kapha
programme.desc: As you’ve learned, Ayurveda recommends different yoga and meditation practices for each of the doshas. In this episode, Sahara Rose will guide you through a meditation that’s designed specifically for Kapha type people.

programme.title: Parsvakonasana
programme.desc: Join Kino for a chair yoga class that builds up to Parsvakonasana, the extended side angle pose.

programme.title: Opening the Hips
programme.desc: Join Kino for some yoga drills that will help you work on opening the hips with some external hip rotation. With this video, you will gain a greater understanding of the movement mechanics involved in the action of external hip rotation. Build strength in all the muscles that are involved in opening the hips through this 40-minute practice.

programme.title: Facing Injury in the Practice
programme.desc: When it comes to yoga practice, there's nothing more difficult that facing an injury.

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in Berlin
programme.desc: Dive into the rich culture, historic wonder and alternative lifestyle of the amazing city of Berlin. If you’ve spent any significant amount of time traveling, you know it can be hard on both your mind and your body. In this episode, you’ll get an inside look at Kino’s morning ritual, which she insists is part of what keeps her grounded amidst all the traveling. Follow Kino around the beautiful city as she teaches to a group of dedicated yogis and gives you an inside look at the city’s tourist sights through the eyes of yoga. Brush up on your Berlin Art and History knowledge as Kino visits the famous TV Tower, The Berlin Wall, one of the city’s last remaining Occupy Buildings, the Berlin Eastside Galleries and more. This episode is just over 20 minutes long.

programme.title: Ustrasana

programme.title: Twist - The Heart - Feel

programme.title: Yoga Nidra for Chakra Balancing
programme.desc: Join Irene for a yoga nidra that’s designed to promote Chakra balancing.

programme.title: Gratitude
programme.desc: This meditation for manifestation will bring gratitude into your life. Settle the attention on the breath as you drop below the frequency of thought and into a more receptive state. Open up to the field of arising sensation and connect a sense of gratitude for the body as a tool in your mindfulness practice. Cultivate awareness of your inner experience, moving away from loops of thoughts and into a state of equanimity, alignment, deep peace and gratitude.

programme.title: Sun Salutations
programme.desc: Join Mark for a class that investigates the main movement positions in the traditional Sun Salutations.

programme.title: Yoga Is Spirit
programme.desc: Today's lesson is on Spirit and how to tune into that space beyond the physical. The vehicle for this deep awareness will be the shoulder stand, Halasana. This class will take you mindfully through warmups and then into several accessible variations of today's inversion practice. You will be invited to drop deeper down into a space of peace as Kino encourages you to tune deeply into the subtle vibrations of the inner body.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Yoga, Money & Conscious Living With Sandy Fernandez
programme.desc: Join Kino for a sit-down conversation with Sandy Fernandez, founder of Karmic Currency.

programme.title: Naturally Bliss Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: Creamy Butternut Squash Tomato Soup with Grilled "Cheese"
programme.desc: It’s everyone’s favorite combo – creamy tomato soup and a grilled cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Apple Pie Pancakes
programme.desc: These Apple Pie Pancakes are gluten-free, vegan and very simple to make.

programme.title: Love's Timeline
programme.desc: Join Kino for a 20 minute meditation that will guide you towards a sense of wholeness and connection to faith. Settle the attention on subtle sensations of breath moving in and out of the body and allow this to coax the mind into calming down. Observe the present moment, from a place of receptivity and embodiment, becoming love and stepping into unity with the heartbeat of the universe.

programme.title: Yoga Drills Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Handstands
programme.desc: Join Kino for 20 minutes of Handstand drills! Not recommended for beginners, this class does require a certain level of pre-established strength and flexibility. Work through these drills every week to take your handstand practice to the next level

programme.title: Prasarita Padottanasana
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that utilizes props to both get you stronger and allow you to relax more. This class flows through standing poses and focuses on the forward fold called Prasarita Padottanasana.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - On the path
programme.desc: Join Kino and Rob Mack for a discussion about how to use your thoughts to put you on the path to your highest potential. Learn practical steps to help you harness the power of your mind to be happier. Hear Rob’s story about how he struggled with depression and found his way to the joy he experiences now.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Reclined Twist
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and has a focus on reclining twists.

programme.title: Utthita Hasta Padangusthasana
programme.desc: This practice starts with breath awareness before moving into a prop supported physical practice. Use a chair to make the challenge of balance work more accessible.

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Body Intelligence Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Backbend - Listen
programme.desc: Join Kino for as class that’s all about backbends and the journey of listening. Begin to tap into the subtle body as you move through this mindful, 25-minute backbending practice. Talk to your muscles and joints and listen to them as you find the strength and flexibility to move through this practice, all while bringing your awareness to various places in the body.

programme.title: Yoga Is Gratitude
programme.desc: A grateful heart is a yogis heart! Today the lesson is built around the standing posture Parsvakonasana A. Begin with a moment of meditation and then flow through a warm up sequence that will calm the mind and guide you towards appreciation of the gifts of breath and life. Cultivate a sense of open, thankful awareness as we approach the extended side angle position, stretching the psoas and creating a sense of openness in the hips.

You will be invited to drop deeper down into a space of peace as Kino encourages you to tune deeply into the subtle vibrations of the inner body.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Yoga, Money & Conscious Living With Sandy Fernandez
programme.desc: Join Kino for a sit-down conversation with Sandy Fernandez, founder of Karmic Currency.

programme.title: Naturally Bliss Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Meet Alexa
programme.desc: Alexa Soto turned her passion for cooking into a way of life.

programme.title: Creamy Butternut Squash Tomato Soup with Grilled "Cheese"
programme.desc: It’s everyone’s favorite combo – creamy tomato soup and a grilled cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Apple Pie Pancakes
programme.desc: These Apple Pie Pancakes are gluten-free, vegan and very simple to make.

programme.title: Love's Timeline
programme.desc: Join Kino for a 20 minute meditation that will guide you towards a sense of wholeness and connection to faith. Settle the attention on subtle sensations of breath moving in and out of the body and allow this to coax the mind into calming down. Observe the present moment, from a place of receptivity and embodiment, becoming love and stepping into unity with the heartbeat of the universe.

programme.title: Yoga Drills Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Handstands
programme.desc: Join Kino for 20 minutes of Handstand drills! Not recommended for beginners, this class does require a certain level of pre-established strength and flexibility. Work through these drills every week to take your handstand practice to the next level

programme.title: Prasarita Padottanasana
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that utilizes props to both get you stronger and allow you to relax more. This class flows through standing poses and focuses on the forward fold called Prasarita Padottanasana.

programme.title: Yoga Inspiration Podcast - On the path
programme.desc: Join Kino and Rob Mack for a discussion about how to use your thoughts to put you on the path to your highest potential. Learn practical steps to help you harness the power of your mind to be happier. Hear Rob’s story about how he struggled with depression and found his way to the joy he experiences now.

programme.title: Breathwork
programme.desc: Use this practice to work with improving your 3-dimensional breathing.

programme.title: Reclined Twist
programme.desc: A relaxing practice that incorporates the fundamentals of yoga and has a focus on reclining twists.

programme.title: Utthita Hasta Padangusthasana
programme.desc: This practice starts with breath awareness before moving into a prop supported physical practice. Use a chair to make the challenge of balance work more accessible.

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Body Intelligence Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Backbend - Listen
programme.desc: Join Kino for as class that’s all about backbends and the journey of listening. Begin to tap into the subtle body as you move through this mindful, 25-minute backbending practice. Talk to your muscles and joints and listen to them as you find the strength and flexibility to move through this practice, all while bringing your awareness to various places in the body.

programme.title: Yoga Is Gratitude
programme.desc: A grateful heart is a yogis heart! Today the lesson is built around the standing posture Parsvakonasana A. Begin with a moment of meditation and then flow through a warm up sequence that will calm the mind and guide you towards appreciation of the gifts of breath and life. Cultivate a sense of open, thankful awareness as we approach the extended side angle position, stretching the psoas and creating a sense of openness in the hips.

programme.title: Freedom and Peace
programme.desc: This meditation for manifestation begins with a few moments of intentional presence. Begin by noticing the feeling of the breath and let this be your gateway to practice. You will also develop an awareness of sensations in the body and the movements of the mind. Kino will guide you into the sense of freedom that can arise from the watching of consciousness that is the act of mindfulness. Planting seeds of peace amidst a stream of anxiety and stress is the heart of today's practice.

programme.title: Yoga for Inflexible People - Grounded Rooted Warrior – Warrior 1
programme.desc: Today's class puts the focus on virabhadrasana, the warriors pose. Using a chair to support the practice, Kino will guide you towards a incremental increase in flexibility as well as a greater sense of mindful presence.

programme.title: Yoga Is Trailer
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Yoga Is Freedom
programme.desc: This class is built around Bridge Pose, a simple backbend. We will us this lifting of the back from the floor to bring energy into the body and explore the yogic notion of Freedom. This class will help you liberate the spine and find just the right depth for your body in backbending. Join Kino as she uses asana to share the essential journey of yoga, is the integration of breath, body and mind. When these 3 come into alignment you experience the clear space of freedom, Kaivalya in Sanskrit.

programme.title: Everyday Strength - The L-sit
programme.desc: Continue your strength progression with Kino. Work on the key elements for L-sits by practicing forward folds, core strengthening drills, and lift ups. End the class by putting all the pieces together to practice the movements required to lift up into L-sits.

programme.title: Yoga and Indian Culture with Ajay Tokas
programme.desc: In this episode of seek up, Kino sits down to talk with level 2 authorized yoga teacher, Ajay Tokas.

programme.title: Yoga Is Peace
programme.desc: Om Shanti. Peace is such an integral part of what yoga is that we usually start and end every class with an invocation of it. This class will utilize a seated forward fold to tap into this yogic sense of tranquility. Today's lesson will increase awareness in pelvis and hips so that we can pivot deeper into Paschimottanasana, the forward fold we visit a few times in the Ashtanga method. Join Kino as we explore yoga as a means to further investigate depths of peacefulness that are possible in practice and life.

programme.title: Everyday Drill
programme.desc: When it comes to building strength and flexibility for a more well-rounded yoga practice, yoga drills can help you expedite the process! Join Kino for a set of yoga drills that offer a little mix of everything. Stretch out and strengthen the core, legs, arms, shoulders, and everything in between. Just over 20 minutes.

programme.title: Side Plank
programme.desc: Begin this gentle flow with a few moments of mindfulness, then explore the basics of yoga as we build up to a supported practice of side plank

programme.title: Omstars Sizzle Reel- no text
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Channel Id 3
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kino in San Francisco
programme.desc: In the latest episode of Global Yogi, Kino climbs the hills of San Fran! Join her as she explores this great town, one of the oldest cities on the United States west coast. Tag along as we venture through the famous micro climates of the city. Cross the Golden Gate Bridge, learn about escapes from Alcatraz, see the Gardens of Lombard Street and so much more! After all those handstands and asanas in front of scenic views, we stop for some of local food and to enjoy the local color. Kino's signature sense of humor and storytelling take center stage in this episode, as she delights in sharing San Francisco with you!

programme.title: David's Recipe Corner - Surf ’n’ Turf Burgers
programme.desc: If you’re a fan of the recipes on In the Kitchen with David® or an avid reader of Program Host David Venable’s best-selling cookbooks, David’s Recipe Corner is the place for you! Every month, grab your apron and watch, shop, and cook along with QVC's Resident Foodie as he guides you through step-by-step recipes that are as easy to make as they are delicious—PLUS the brands that make preparing them a breeze. And it’s all streaming free, only on QVC+.

programme.title: Laura Geller Makeup Studio
programme.desc: A top New York City makeup artist, Laura Geller is known in the industry as an innovator who creates makeup colors and formulas that appeal to all women. Her approach to makeup, and her popular Laura Geller Makeup Collection, is that it should deliver professional quality results with simple, no instructions required application. Her experience has led her to create a line of multi-purpose baked color cosmetics, her uniquely Italian, handcrafted Baked Color Cosmetics Collection, designed to adjust to your skin tone and deliver more than ordinary powder, with exceptional luminosity for a flawless, radiant look. Discover the believable beauty of baked Laura Geller makeup, iconic favorites such as Laura Geller Spackle and innovative formulas and inspiring new products in wonderfully wearable colors based on real beauty needs, not soon-to-be-forgotten trends. Let Laura Geller take the guesswork out of cosmetics application with expert advice, time-saving tips and high-performance products for easily achievable looks. For makeup that's inviting, innovative, informative and ingenious - look no further than Laura Geller Makeup Studio on QVC(R). Laura Geller ... Beauty Ingenuity.

It's quick and easy to add the look of instant volume to your hair and switch up your look-from a classic, chic bob to a glamorous up-do to waves of luxurious curls-and build a wardrobe of hairstyles to match every mood. For perfectly styled hair in a flash, shop Toni Brattin Hair Fabulous.

programme.title: by Stacy London - Fashion
programme.desc: From the woman who told America what NOT to wear for over a decade comes style expert Stacy London's honest, funny, unfiltered and savvy approach to what to wear now at any age with her own collection, by Stacy London. As Stacy says, "This collection was born out of my own desire to experience joy in mid-life. I have never felt more like myself, despite body changes and menopause, and I couldn't find clothes that made me look as confident as I feel." by Stacy London is meant to be personal, with multiple ways to wear each piece to make it your own, including Stacy's signature Addables, versatile collars, cuffs, and more that can be collected and changed out to create layered looks without the bulk. All the comfort without losing any of the style. Find the joy in getting dressed again by Stacy London.
